Home

whoami

I am just a mathematician from Barcelona, Spain. I enjoy solving CTF challenges and participate regularly under the username d1533.

This blog was created in order to consolidate and share the knowledge I acquire while learning. I’m currently looking to join a CTF team and I focus on cryptography and binary exploitation. If your team is recruiting, feel free to leave me a message!
